Career Opportunities
EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES

Parkdale Montessori School welcomes applications for employment throughout the academic year for Montessori careers in Ottawa. Interested applicants may submit their résumé by mail or email. The School offers a very competitive salary, a comprehensive benefits package, and support for professional development.

EMAIL

If you are interested in applying, please email us at administration@parkdalemontessori.ca with your resumé.

Affiliations

Parkdale Montessori School is an AMI Accredited School and proud member of the following:

 
Parkdale Montessori School

Our journey began in January 2007 as a small
school in the basement of a local church. Today,
we are located in large residential home within
steps of Reid Park and have programs for
Toddlers, Preschoolers and Kindergarteners. We also
provide extended care and summer camps.
